steps.title: Identify the required detail
steps.content: The student wants to identify the sculpture for which Arp won the gold medal. The sentence therefore needs both the prize connection and the artwork's title, Sculpture classique.

steps.title: Eliminate incomplete choices
steps.content: A mentions a sculpture but does not name it. B names Arp and the medal but omits the sculpture. D describes the Carnegie Prize but does not mention Arp or the artwork. The only choice that links Arp's medal to Sculpture classique satisfies the goal. The answer is C.
